contents: {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} was fined £5,339 for speeding, reckless driving, and property destruction. His passenger, {a=Person_Rick}Rick{a}, had planted a bomb into the truck that will detonate when the accelerator was released. For the next 3 minutes and 18 seconds, he proceeded to accelerate up to 92 mph, destroy 2 barriers, and hit an SUV off the road. It then culminated in a head-on collision with another truck carrying concrete, setting off the bomb, and obliterating the truck ahead.

The mastermind behind the incident was later found to be {a=Person_ThunderbirdRed}Thunderbird Red{a}. He was then sentenced to 100 years of maid duties for {a=Person_Mawchan}Mawchan{a}, must admit they are a furry every Sunday at 8:40pm BST, and is banned from drinking soju. Some people continue to deny his involvement, like AI Brian and Jeremy Clarkson.
